title: hibiscus tiliaceus subsp. hastatus
intro: Hibiscus tiliaceus subsp. hastatus, also known as the coastal hibiscus, is a subspecies of Hibiscus tiliaceus, a flowering plant native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing cholesterol levels, improving liver function, and acting as an antioxidant. Hibiscus tiliaceus subsp. hastatus can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed for their medicinal and health-promoting properties.
